services.name: AC Repair
services.shortDescription: Fast diagnosis and repair for central air conditioning systems, ductless mini-splits, and heat pumps.

services.name: AC Installation
services.shortDescription: New AC system installation with proper load calculation, ductwork assessment, and energy-efficient equipment selection.

services.name: Heating Repair
services.shortDescription: Expert repair for heat pumps, electric furnaces, and heat strip systems.

services.name: Duct Cleaning & Sealing
services.shortDescription: Professional ductwork inspection, cleaning, sanitization, and leak sealing.

services.name: Maintenance Plans
services.shortDescription: Seasonal tune-ups, priority scheduling, and extended equipment life.

services.name: Emergency HVAC
services.shortDescription: 24/7 emergency response for complete AC failures, refrigerant leaks, and electrical faults.

design.differentiator: Asymmetric hero with badge/rank-inspired layout. Steel blue + warm gold like a chief's insignia. Double-border cards. Badge/chevron decorative elements. Authoritative without being aggressive.

displayFont.usage: h1, h2, h3, hero headlines, section titles, badge labels

bodyFont.usage: body text, paragraphs, UI labels, nav links, form fields

colors._note: LIGHT mode colors. Primary from brands-index.json (L=0.62), NOT the dark brand.ts value (L=0.40).

primary.usage: headers, nav active state, primary buttons, icon fills, section dividers

primaryDark.usage: hover states on primary elements, active nav, pressed buttons

primaryLight.usage: primary tint backgrounds, badge fills, subtle highlights

accent.usage: CTAs, trust badges, star ratings, decorative chevrons, gold insignia elements

accentDark.usage: hover on accent buttons, active gold elements

accentLight.usage: accent tint backgrounds, light gold washes, badge glow

surface.usage: card backgrounds, elevated sections, alternating section bg

surfaceAlt.usage: secondary surface for deeper nesting, sidebar bg

ctaStyle.primary: Directive, authoritative — 'Deploy a Technician Now', 'Request Your Chief'
ctaStyle.emergency: Urgent authority — 'Emergency Dispatch Now', 'Call the Chief 24/7'

aboutNarrative.angle: Leadership and command-level expertise narrative. 12 years of commanding comfort in South Florida. The 'chief' as the highest rank of HVAC mastery. Emphasis on first-visit resolution, same-day service, and the discipline of a well-run operation. South Florida climate expertise (salt air, humidity, year-round cooling loads) as specialized knowledge that sets the team apart.

reviewPersonas.name: Patricia K.
reviewPersonas.angle: Emergency response speed — 45 min arrival, same-day fix

reviewPersonas.name: David R.
reviewPersonas.angle: System upgrade ROI — energy bill savings, professional crew

reviewPersonas.name: Maria S.
reviewPersonas.angle: Long-term relationship — 3 years, preventive value, trust

reviewPersonas.name: James T.
reviewPersonas.angle: After-hours emergency — 1 AM call, blower motor, same-night fix

reviewPersonas.name: Linda W.
reviewPersonas.angle: Air quality improvement — musty air resolved, energy savings

reviewPersonas.name: Carlos M.
reviewPersonas.angle: Honesty and speed — diagnosed fast, fair price, transparent

faqTopics: Service area coverage (Boca Raton + Fort Lauderdale metro)
AC repair vs. replacement decision framework
Maintenance plan ROI and warranty preservation
South Florida-specific HVAC challenges (humidity, salt air, year-round cooling)
Duct cleaning frequency and health benefits
Permitting in Broward and Palm Beach counties
Brands serviced (Carrier, Trane, Lennox, Rheem, Daikin)

hero.description: Rotating 3D HVAC unit with floating temperature readouts

specs.model: Stylized residential condenser unit — low-poly clean-geometric aesthetic, steel blue metallic material
specs.geometry: BoxGeometry base (1.2 x 0.8 x 1.0) with CylinderGeometry fan grill on top, rounded edges via bevel
specs.material: MeshStandardMaterial — metallic: 0.7, roughness: 0.3, color mapped to primary oklch(0.62 0.04 200)
specs.animation: Continuous Y-axis rotation at 0.3 rad/s, fan grill spins independently at 2.0 rad/s

floatingReadouts.label: 72 F
floatingReadouts.style: Html overlay (drei) with frosted glass bg, Bricolage Grotesque font, accent gold text

floatingReadouts.label: 45% Humidity
floatingReadouts.style: Same frosted glass, secondary readout size

floatingReadouts.label: SEER 24
floatingReadouts.style: Badge-shaped container with double border matching card style

specs.lighting: ambientLight(0.4) + directionalLight(1.0, position: [5, 5, 5]) + pointLight(accent color, position: [-3, 2, 2], intensity: 0.5)
specs.interaction: OrbitControls with autoRotate, damping enabled, zoom disabled, vertical rotation limited to 15 degrees
specs.fallback: Static hero image /images/hero.jpg with CSS parallax

serviceCards.description: 3D tool/equipment icons per service, rendered inline on each service card

specs.renderer: Individual Canvas per card (150x150px) or shared offscreen canvas with viewports

models.geometry: ExtrudeGeometry from SVG wrench path, depth 0.15
CylinderGeometry tube + SphereGeometry bulb, compound group
LatheGeometry from flame profile curve, 3 nested layers with decreasing opacity
3x TorusGeometry blades arrayed 120 degrees around center CylinderGeometry hub
TorusGeometry(0.5, 0.08, arc: 270deg) + needle as thin BoxGeometry pivoting from center
CylinderGeometry base + SphereGeometry dome + pulsing PointLight inside

specs.animation: Hover triggers 360-degree Y-rotation over 0.6s (spring easing), idle state has subtle 5-degree oscillation
specs.fallback: Lucide icon SVG (existing icon set from services.ts)

trustBadges.description: Embossed gold chief's badge with subtle rotation on hover

specs.geometry: Shield/badge shape via ExtrudeGeometry from custom SVG path — 5-pointed star inset, beveled edges (bevelThickness: 0.04, bevelSize: 0.03)
specs.material: MeshPhysicalMaterial — color: accent oklch(0.66 0.12 60), metalness: 0.9, roughness: 0.15, clearcoat: 1.0, clearcoatRoughness: 0.1
specs.embossedText: Troika-three-text or drei <Text3D> with Bricolage Grotesque — extruded 0.02 depth, positioned on badge face
specs.animation: Idle: subtle 3-degree Y oscillation (sin wave, 3s period). Hover: smooth 15-degree Y rotation + 5% scale-up over 0.4s
specs.lighting: Dedicated spotlight with warm color temperature (3200K equivalent) to enhance gold metallic sheen
specs.instances: One per trust badge (4 total), each with unique embossed text: 'Licensed', 'Insured', '12+ Yrs', '4.8 Stars'
specs.fallback: SVG badge icon with CSS gold gradient fill and box-shadow glow

cta.description: Particle system with brand-colored dots flowing like airflow

specs.behavior: Particles follow Perlin noise-based vector field simulating airflow — gentle left-to-right drift with turbulence swirls
specs.size: Random 2-6px, opacity mapped to velocity (faster = more opaque)
specs.bounds: Full-width CTA section background, particles wrap at edges
specs.animation: Continuous flow at ~0.5 units/s base velocity, subtle acceleration on scroll-into-view
specs.interaction: Mouse/touch position creates attractor point — particles curve toward cursor within 150px radius then resume flow
specs.performance: requestAnimationFrame with delta time, instancedBufferGeometry for GPU efficiency, paused when section not in viewport (IntersectionObserver)
specs.fallback: CSS gradient background with subtle animated gradient-shift (background-position animation)

globalConfig.brandWatermark: HVAC Repair Chief logo badge, bottom-right corner, 8% opacity

intro.purpose: Brand introduction for website hero, YouTube channel intro, paid ad pre-roll

storyboard.visual: Black screen fades up. 3D gold chief's badge rotates into frame from slight top-down angle. Badge catches light, metallic gleam sweeps across surface. Brand name 'HVAC Repair Chief' types in below badge in Bricolage Grotesque.
storyboard.audio: Subtle metallic shimmer SFX, low ambient hum

storyboard.visual: Badge shrinks to corner. TradeShot-sourced images cycle in 2-second intervals: technician at condenser unit, duct inspection with camera, new system installation. Each image slides in from right with chevron-wipe transition. Service name overlays in accent gold.
storyboard.audio: Upbeat corporate track fades in, subtle whoosh on each transition

storyboard.visual: Full-width stat counter section on surface background. Four counters animate simultaneously: '12+' years, '4.8' star rating, '85+' reviews, '24/7' emergency. Numbers count up with spring easing. Gold accent underlines each.

Clean CTA screen — primary background. Tagline 'Commanding Comfort Across South Florida' in display font. Phone numbers for both locations stack below. Airflow particle effect in background (simplified 2D version). Logo badge returns to center.
storyboard.audio: Music resolves, subtle chime on final frame

serviceExplainers.purpose: Service page embed, YouTube how-it-works, Facebook/Google ad

storyboard.visual: Animated diagram of residential AC system (condenser, evaporator, ducts, thermostat). Red warning indicator appears on failing component (capacitor). Temperature readout rises from 72 to 85. Homeowner discomfort implied by rising thermometer graphic.
storyboard.overlay: Text: 'When Your AC Fails in South Florida Heat...'

storyboard.visual: Map animation showing truck icon dispatching from HVAC Repair Chief HQ to home pin. Arrival timer counts from 0 to '< 60 min'. Technician silhouette with diagnostic equipment. System diagram highlights as each component is tested (airflow, refrigerant, electrical, thermostat).

Animated clipboard with line items appearing (written estimate). Checkmark animation. Cut to: capacitor component highlighted, old part fades out, new part fades in with green glow. Tools animate: wrench tightening, multimeter reading.
storyboard.overlay: Step 2: Quote / Step 3: Repair — 'No surprises. Manufacturer-grade parts.'

storyboard.visual: System diagram returns — all indicators turn green. Temperature readout drops from 85 to 72. Airflow arrows animate through duct system. Transition to CTA: phone number, '90-Day Warranty on All Repairs', logo badge.

serviceExplainers.purpose: Service page embed, YouTube how-it-works, consideration-stage ad

storyboard.visual: Animated house cross-section. Manual J calculation overlay: square footage, insulation rating, window area, orientation arrows. Numbers populate and a tonnage result appears with checkmark.
storyboard.overlay: 'Every Installation Starts with Science' — Manual J Load Calculation

storyboard.visual: Three AC unit options slide in (good/better/best). SEER2 ratings animate above each (16/20/24). Energy cost comparison bar chart. Customer selects high-efficiency option — golden highlight.
Time-lapse style: old unit fades out, new condenser and air handler fade in with installation animations. Duct connections animate. Permit document stamps 'APPROVED'. Clock shows single-day timeline.
storyboard.overlay: Step 3: Install — 'Most residential installs completed in one day'

storyboard.visual: Technician runs system test — refrigerant gauge, airflow measurement, thermostat programming. All green indicators. Energy bill comparison: old vs. new (animated bar chart showing savings). CTA with financing mention.
storyboard.overlay: Step 4: Commission — 'Verified performance. Flexible financing available.'

serviceExplainers.purpose: Service page embed, indoor air quality awareness campaign

storyboard.visual: Cross-section of ductwork — dust particles, mold spores, pollen visible inside ducts. Air flows through and particles disperse into living space. Family member sneezes. Microscope zoom effect on contaminants.
Duct camera POV moving through dirty ductwork — simulated inspection footage. Leaks shown with animated air escaping. Airflow measurements at registers show imbalance (varying arrow sizes).
storyboard.overlay: Step 1: Assess — 'Camera inspection. Leak testing. Airflow measurement.'

storyboard.visual: HEPA vacuum animation extracting debris from ducts — before/after split screen. Antimicrobial treatment sprays through system (blue mist animation). Duct sealing with mastic — leak points sealed one by one.
storyboard.overlay: Steps 2-4: Clean, Treat, Seal — 'HEPA extraction. EPA-registered treatment. Mastic sealing.'

storyboard.visual: Clean ducts cross-section — air flows cleanly. Energy bill comparison (20-30% savings highlighted). Family breathing easy. DOE stat citation. CTA with phone and logo badge.
storyboard.overlay: 'Measurably better air. Lower energy bills. Guaranteed.'

serviceExplainers.purpose: Emergency awareness, paid search/display ad, social proof

storyboard.visual: Night scene — clock reads 1:00 AM. AC unit makes grinding noise (animated vibration lines). Breaker trips (spark animation). Indoor temperature starts climbing. Red alert pulse.
Phone rings — live dispatcher answers (speech bubble animation). Map shows nearest crew deploying. Truck icon moves toward home pin. Timer: 'Arrived in 47 minutes'.
Technician arrives with fully stocked truck (tool inventory animation). Diagnoses blower motor failure. Replacement part from truck. Repair animation. System powers back on — cool air flows.

Temperature readout drops back to 72. Clock now reads 2:15 AM. 'No overtime premium' badge animates in. James T. review quote fades in as testimonial. CTA: emergency line numbers for both locations. Logo badge.
storyboard.overlay: 'Same rates. Any hour. Call the Chief.'

variants.name: Before/After AC Repair
variants.storyboard: 0-3s: Broken AC — ice on coils, warm air reading. Red tint. Text: 'BEFORE'. | 3-5s: Chief badge transition wipe. | 5-12s: Time-lapse repair — diagnosis, part swap, system restart. | 12-15s: 'AFTER' — cool 72 readout, green indicators. CTA: phone number overlay + 'Link in bio'.
variants.audio: Trending audio-compatible (music bed removable), repair SFX

variants.name: 60-Second Emergency Response
variants.storyboard: 0-2s: Night scene, AC failure alert. | 2-5s: Phone call, dispatch animation. | 5-10s: Truck en route, timer counting. | 10-13s: On-site repair montage. | 13-15s: 'Under 60 Minutes. Every Time.' + phone number.
variants.audio: Urgent tempo beat, clock tick SFX

variants.name: Duct Cleaning Reveal
variants.storyboard: 0-3s: Camera entering dirty duct (POV). | 3-5s: Zoom on contaminants with labels. | 5-10s: HEPA vacuum extraction — satisfying cleaning footage. | 10-13s: Before/after split. | 13-15s: 'Breathe Better Today' + CTA.
variants.audio: Satisfying ASMR-style vacuum SFX, light music

logo.description: Chief's badge/shield emblem containing brand name in Bricolage Grotesque. Five-pointed star or crossed-wrench motif inside shield. Clean geometric lines, not overly detailed — works at 32px favicon size up to billboard.
logo.clearSpace: Minimum clear space = height of the letter 'H' in wordmark on all sides
logo.minimumSize: 32px width for badge-only mark, 120px width for full lockup

pattern.name: Chief's Chevron
pattern.description: Repeating upward-pointing chevron stripes at 60-degree angles. Clean geometric lines. Subtle, not busy — used as background texture at 3-5% opacity or as decorative section dividers at full opacity.

colorApplications.name: Subtle Background
colorApplications.usage: Hero section background, card hover state, section fill

colorApplications.name: Print Pattern
colorApplications.usage: Business card backgrounds, letterhead watermark, vehicle wrap panels

colorApplication.primaryRule: Primary steel blue on white/light backgrounds (light mode compliant)
colorApplication.accentRule: Accent warm gold for emphasis, CTAs, badges, and trust elements only — never as large-area fill

printCMYK.primary: C:42 M:18 Y:10 K:0 (approximate for oklch(0.62 0.04 200))
printCMYK.accent: C:5 M:22 Y:68 K:0 (approximate for oklch(0.66 0.12 60))

applications.front: White bg, primary logo lockup centered, accent gold divider line, contact info in body font
applications.back: Chevron pattern at 8% opacity on white, phone numbers for both locations

applications.layout: White base, primary badge logo oversized on doors, accent gold chevron stripe along body line, phone number in display font on rear quarter

applications.embroidery: Primary badge logo left chest, Bricolage Grotesque wordmark on right sleeve, accent gold thread for star detail

applications.layout: White corrugated, primary badge top-center, 'HVAC Repair Chief' below, accent gold phone number banner at bottom
Badge logo top-left, chevron pattern watermark at 3% across full page, contact footer in body font

tradeShotDirection.style: Professional HVAC technician photography — clean uniforms, real equipment, South Florida residential settings
tradeShotDirection.colorGrading: Slight cool-tone grade to match steel blue primary. Warm gold accent in highlights (sunset light, equipment gleam).
subjects: Duct inspection with camera equipment (indoor, attic/crawlspace)
New system installation crew at work
Emergency technician arriving at night with truck lights
Maintenance tune-up close-up (coil cleaning, gauge reading)
Happy homeowner with technician (job completion handshake)
